info.title: EGroupware RAG REST API
info.description: REST API for searching and retrieving entries from the EGroupware RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) system. Supports full-text and semantic search with filtering and custom property selection.

servers.description: Production server (replace with your EGroupware URL)

get.description: Searches the RAG for entries matching the provided pattern. Returns results with customizable properties and filtering options.

parameters.name: Accept
parameters.description: REQUIRED Accept header for JSON or pretty-printed JSON

parameters.name: filters[search]
parameters.description: Search pattern (must be at least 3 characters long)

parameters.name: filters[apps][]
parameters.description: Limit search to specific app(s), default is to search all apps. Can be specified multiple times e.g. 'filters[apps][]=addressbook&filters[apps][]=calendar'. Do NOT specify 'rag', it will find nothing!

parameters.name: filters[type]
parameters.description: Type of search to use (hybrid (fulltext and rag), fulltext, or rag)

parameters.name: filters[order]
parameters.description: Order of results: default gives rag results first and then fulltext results for hybrid search. RAG distance of 0 means a 100% match, 1 means no match at all. Fulltext relevance is higher for more relevant matches. The default order of 'default ASC' returns best matches first, independent of search-type parameter.

parameters.name: props[]
parameters.description: List of DAV properties to return (e.g., props[]=displayname)

parameters.name: sync-token
parameters.description: Sync token to request changes since last sync (not yet supported)

parameters.name: nresults
parameters.description: Limit number of responses (only for sync-collection)

200.description: A list of RAG entries matching the search criteria

400.description: Bad request (e.g., search pattern too short)

basicAuth.description: Basic authentication with username and password or token

relevance.description: Full-text search relevance (higher = better match). Only results with at least 5% of the highest match are returned.

distance.description: Semantic search distance (0.0 = 100% match, 1.0 = no match, -1.0 = opposite). Only results < 0.4 are returned.

description.description: Multi-line text field of the entry (e.g., note field of a contact)

extra.description: Array of further full-text indexed text fields

app_id.description: ID of the entry in its app

responses.description: Map of RAG entry paths to RAG entry objects, titles, or null (for deleted resources)

more-results.description: Indicates if there are more results available

sync-token.description: Sync token for the next request
